ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Script to search transcript for the end of dining.html."}
CodeContent:
"import json

path = "/Users/pravinsam/.gemini/antigravity-ide/brain/353b6a43-7fa1-4a16-b18d-9ef0cd6ad7d2/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        data = json.loads(line)
        content = str(data.get("content", ""))
        output = str(data.get("output", ""))
        if "dining.html" in content or "dining.html" in output:
            step_idx = data.get("step_index")
            # Look for lines 800+ or script tags at the end of dining.html
            if "801:" in content or "801:" in output or "851" in content or "851" in output:
                print(f"Step {step_idx} contains dining.html lines 801+")
                with open(f"step_{step_idx}_end.json", "w") as out_f:
                    json.dump(data, out_f, indent=2)
"
Description: "Search logs for the remaining lines of dining.html"
